required.name: ami
required.description: AMI ID to use for the instance

optional.name: availability_zone
optional.description: AZ to start the instance in

optional.name: subnet_id
optional.description: VPC Subnet ID to launch in

optional.name: key_name
optional.description: Key pair name for SSH access

optional.name: user_data
optional.description: User data script for instance initialization

services.name: Auto Scaling Policy
services.description: Scaling policy for Auto Scaling Groups

services.description: SSH key pair for EC2 access
